introSection: Spinning Dragons is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Worlds of Fun in Kansas City, Missouri, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On October 29, 2003, Spinning Dragons was announced, as well as the removal of Orient Express. Spinning Dragons welcomed its first passengers on April 17, 2004.

The queue line received a new shade structure in 2025.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The layout is identical to that of Timberland Twister (now Fairly Odd Coaster) at Nickelodeon Universe in Bloomington, Minnesota, which opened the same year.

fullText:
Spinning Dragons is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Worlds of Fun in Kansas City, Missouri, USA.

On October 29, 2003, Spinning Dragons was announced, as well as the removal of Orient Express. Spinning Dragons welcomed its first passengers on April 17, 2004.

The queue line received a new shade structure in 2025.

The layout is identical to that of Timberland Twister (now Fairly Odd Coaster) at Nickelodeon Universe in Bloomington, Minnesota, which opened the same year.
